findings.implementation_details: src/main.rs implements clap-based CLI with List, Status, Fetch, Catalog (list/search/sync), Validate, and Examples subcommands. Progress bars using indicatif (ProgressBar::new_spinner, ProgressStyle::with_template, enable_steady_tick, set_message, finish_with_message) are implemented in the Fetch handler. Colored output via colored crate used throughout.
findings.tests: tests/cli_integration.rs exists with integration tests for --help, catalog --help, --version, invalid subcommand error, and missing fetch args.
findings.git_commits: Multiple relevant commits: 62578c5 'feat: mature open social data pipeline', 7f14dc7 'feat: add path-based catalog sync persistence', 7fd3def 'fix-windows-gnu-validation', and others touching the track directory.
